subject: Combusken, a bipedal bird-like Pokemon with an orange and cream body, shown in a dynamic fighting kick pose amid flames
description: A bipedal bird-like creature in orange and cream tones strikes a dynamic kick pose, leg extended, surrounded by swirling flame and energy. The figure is mid-action with an aggressive, combative stance. Warm flame and light effects dominate the background and foreground, emphasizing heat and power. The palette is orange, amber, and cream against a warm fiery backdrop.
foreground: bipedal bird creature in a kicking pose amid flames
